message:
test(fcp-host): add placeholder hash detection and provenance validation tests

Cover is_placeholder_hash for all known placeholder entries (literal
PLACEHOLDER_HASH, all-zeros-64, SHA-256-of-empty, BLAKE3-of-empty),
case insensitivity with trimming, and verify real production hashes
are not falsely rejected. Test validate_artifact_provenance rejection
messages, remediation hints, and policy gate values.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
